untranslatable_reason: Safety band size parameter marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source material. Exact band width in points/percentage not specified in provided text excerpt. Cannot implement precise safety band offset without this value.
translation_notes: Used sma_5 and sma_20 as exact period matches. Primary entry signal is the moving average crossover. Secondary condition added to confirm price is on correct side of fast MA. Exit conditions use reversal crossover (AUTHOR_SILENT fallback). Safety band implementation deferred pending threshold specification. Applicable to TRENDING market regimes as specified.
